case_title: MADDOX, MALACHI VS PRO AUTO ENGINE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,110.00 FILED BY MADDOX, MALACHI AS TO DEFENDANT PRO AUTO ENGINE GOO, ROGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
